canonical_name: Prior-art / novelty audit (blinded cross-script admin schema induction)

mechanical_verdict: NOVELTY_SUPPORTED (combinatorial); 0/20 works satisfy the defining conjunction
source_dependencies: external literature only; nearest neighbour Born/Monroe/Kelley/Sarkar 2025 (Proto-Elamite); Helena Tomas (LA vs LB admin); Corazza et al. 2021
features_channels: NOT_APPLICABLE
algorithm_model: structured literature search + hand-backfilled synthesis (novelty-boundary agent failed StructuredOutput, backfilled by hand)
search_space_params: 4 novelty axes; defining conjunction of 4 primitives
positive_negative_controls: NOT_APPLICABLE
primary_metric_value: 0/20 works satisfy full conjunction (REPORT_ONLY, prior_art_register.csv has 20 rows)
uncertainty: honest residual: primitives individually precedented; novelty is combinatorial, not a gate on the science
ablations_robustness: NOT_APPLICABLE
contamination_leakage: NOT_APPLICABLE
strongest_authorized_claim: The combination is unprecedented in the 20 audited works
forbidden_stronger_claim: That the method is guaranteed to work / is scientifically validated
limitations_blockers: One agent failed StructuredOutput; verdict explicitly attackable; novelty not load-bearing on the science
supersession_relations: Precedes ADMIN-02..08

algorithm_model: NOT_APPLICABLE
positive_negative_controls: NOT_APPLICABLE
primary_metric_value: NOT_APPLICABLE
uncertainty: Top transfer risk flagged: LA<->LB sign-inventory non-homomorphy
ablations_robustness: NOT_APPLICABLE
contamination_leakage: Blinding firewall designed to prevent phonetic-value leak into model-visible graph
strongest_authorized_claim: DAMOS is a sufficient blinded LB backbone; LA is natively opaque
forbidden_stronger_claim: Any semantic/phonetic use of the eval-only key
limitations_blockers: Sign-inventory non-homomorphy => represent signs within-script-opaque + AB-shared bridge only

ablations_robustness: LF_CROSS_SOURCE_CONCORDANCE may count agreement only ACROSS independence classes

canonical_name: Experiment 1 — masked logogram (commodity channel) recovery from opaque word context

algorithm_model: M_struct (structure-only) + M_sign (sub-lexical sign-bag NB)

positive_negative_controls: null = label shuffle (0.144); baselines frequency (0.175) + document-series shortcut (0.63)
multiplicity_correction: min detectable over series computed (0.69 at n=457)
primary_metric_value: M_sign 0.182 vs freq 0.175 / series 0.63 / null 0.144; M_struct 0.186; cross-site KN->nonKN M_sign 0.073 vs baseline 0.115 (NEGATIVE transfer) (VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT masked_logogram.json)
power: well-powered (457 A12 units; fixed the label-route underpower)
ablations_robustness: A12 enforced; cross-site direction tested
contamination_leakage: A12 removes lexical identity; series shortcut explicitly the convenience to remove

canonical_name: Family B — Semitic root existence search-null (H2: A-TA-I-*301-WA-JA contains N-W-Y)
research_question: Is the N-W-Y root a specific, exceptional consequence of /na/, or a generic outcome of a family-wide weak-root search over admissible *301 onsets?
mechanical_verdict: REJECT — root existence is a generic search outcome: 31% (strict n-w-y) to 77% (weak+hollow collapse) of admissible *301 C1 onsets hit a real Semitic root; under weak collapse only onset n reaches a dwell-tier gloss, and only via a III-y->III-h transform + selecting Hebrew/Aramaic over yod-matching Arabic/Ugaritic
data_sources+corpus_version: BDB-cited B1 root table (Hebrew nwh, Aramaic nwh, Akkadian nw', Ugaritic nwy, Arabic nwy, Phoenician blocked); 6 admitted Semitic languages

features_channels: root_existence_rate; dwell_tier_hit_rate; exact_or_near_rate; per-onset roots hit
algorithm_model: enumerate 13 onsets x 3 collapse modes (strict / weak / weak+hollow); check real Semitic root existence + gloss tier
search_space+params: 65 values; 6 languages; 5 consonant collapses incl hollow; 4 segmentations; ~1500 triconsonantal roots/lang; 3.63 mean gloss senses/root
segmentation: vowel-strip na-wa-ya -> n-w-y (the reading's own segmentation)
heldout_design: H2 held-out recurrence tested in family C/D (root recurs 0/3 divergent held-out sites)

null_family+run_count: value-null across 13 onsets x 3 collapse modes; best-of-language
multiplicity_correction: P(>=1 dwell hit over logged 7800 cells) = 1.0; over author 10^5 = 1.0
primary_metric+value: strict root_existence_rate 0.3077 / weak 0.5385 / weak+hollow 0.7692; strict dwell_tier_hit_rate 0.0; weak/weakhollow dwell_tier_hit_rate 0.0769; best-of-language P(dwell) 0.75
uncertainty: SOURCE_UNCERTAIN for Ugaritic nwy 'drive-away' (not counted in load-bearing tiers)

canonical_name: End-to-end adaptive null programme + whole-pipeline false-positive rate

Best-of-search manufactures a coherent real-root exact-tier reading on essentially every null run (per-random-value root existence 0.769). Even with 'dwell' pre-committed, a dwell-tier hit is CERTAIN over the 7,800 logged root/gloss cells (1.0). 10/13 admissible onsets already yield a real Semitic weak/hollow root with a citable gloss. Lexical/gloss legs (H2/H3) = NULL_PUBLISHED; edit-distance channel NO_POWER; S_morph NO_DISCRIMINATIVE_POWER; because PC passed, this is a genuine negative

contamination_leakage: out-of-sample (LOO/LOFO); learned correspondences match published Egyptology (l→r), not noise

canonical_name: Internal-only Linear A slot classifier (Task A)
research_question: Can each distinct Linear A word-form be assigned a document-role / semantic slot (TOPONYM_LIKE, COMMODITY, TRANSACTION_TERM, RITUAL_FORMULA, PERSON_NAME_LIKE, ...) using ONLY evidence internal to the LA corpus, frozen before any external anchor touches LA?
method_family: deterministic rule-based tiered classifier (recurrence/position/genre features; stdlib-only)
mechanical_verdict: Frozen manifest of 1165 candidates; 11 tier-B TOPONYM_LIKE = the E3 target set. Deterministic-regeneration hash MATCH.

source_dependencies: LA silver corpus only; ontology used for sign CLASS (logogram/syllabogram) never phonetic value
effective_n_independence_unit: 1165 distinct word-forms (unit = unique form); 11 tier-B TOPONYM_LIKE, 44 incl tier-C, 27 COMMODITY(A), 3 TRANSACTION_TERM(A), 359 PERSON_NAME_LIKE(C), 243 RITUAL_FORMULA, 485 UNKNOWN, 370 tier-X excluded
features_channels: occ/n_sites/n_docs recurrence, sign length, damage flag, header_rate/terminal_rate/pre_num_rate/post_logo position, adj_kuro/adj_kiro, ritual_genre_rate, support genre. NO phonetic feature
algorithm_model: tiered deterministic rules (X exclude, TRANSACTION_TERM, COMMODITY, RITUAL_FORMULA, entry-leading TOPONYM/PERSON, UNKNOWN); tiers A/B/C/X
search_space_params: no search; fixed rule thresholds (ritual_genre_rate>=0.5, header/pre_num>=0.5, n_sites>=2 OR n_docs>=3); split seed 20260706
segmentation: uses corpus word-form segmentation; per-sign alternative transcriptions NOT propagated (alternative_transcriptions=[])
preregistration_plan_hash: rule version slot-rules-v1-2026-07-06; manifest gold sha256 dc9653a91d7ba14dcb762389... in data/manifests/slot_candidate_manifest.sha256
heldout_design: leave-one-site-out (heldout_group=primary site), seed 20260706, recorded in manifest checksum
positive_negative_controls: 11/11 leakage tests (stdlib-only imports; opens only 2 pinned corpus files; refuses to run if a matcher module exists)
primary_metric_value: counts by class x tier (see effective_n); reproducibility hash dc9653a9...5d024551 MATCH

mechanical_verdict: CANARY_HOLDS at every eps: real S_lex clears corrected-margin bar (0.759>0.389 at eps=0.25) [VERIFIED_FROM_ARTIFACT results/lfake_canary.json]

source_dependencies: Nair-style calibration; Cornish-Fisher moments; Snyder 2010 benchmark

algorithm_model: root triples sampled from candidate's empirical trilateral-root freq; deterministic template seating
heldout_design: leakage-controlled split (lexicon on one half, score held-out Ugaritic) still clears
positive_negative_controls: positive: real Ugaritic<->Hebrew S_lex; canary: S_lex(Ugaritic, L_fake)

uncertainty: thicker n=300 tail higher than n=16 p95 (which understated)
ablations_robustness: F.2 root-template gap 0.84->0.33 fixed; whole-form Hebrew collision 14.8%->0.0
contamination_leakage: honesty correction: dropped 'zero real lexical content' overclaim (~75% forms contain a real Hebrew trilateral BY design)

forbidden_stronger_claim: a definitionally-foreign floor; a discovery (it is a floor not a discovery)
limitations_blockers: calibrated not foreign; MEDIUM fixes required before pointing at LLM-contamination use
supersession_relations: n_fake 16->300 (review P1.4); feeds PC-01 gate + PC-21 calibration
